description: Legal document. Deposition on cession of rights in the "Estate of the Jerusalemites," ca. 1160. The uncle of Bū Saʿīd Ibn al-Muqaddasī renounces his right in the "Estate of the Jerusalemites" in favour of his nephew. One additional witness was present. From same notebook as Bodl. MS heb. f 22/43b. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 295 #64.) See also Goitein, Med Soc II, Appendix A, #165.
description_he: מסמך משפטי. ויתור על זכויות ב'נכסי הירושלמים', בערך 1160. הדוד מוותר על חלקו לטובת אחיינו.
